# Code of Conduct

## Our pledge

We pledge to make participation in Bias Noticer a harassment-free experience for everyone, regardless of age, body size, disability, ethnicity, gender identity and expression, experience level, nationality, personal appearance, race, religion, or sexual identity and orientation.

## Our standards

**Positive behaviors include:**

- Focusing on techniques and evidence, not personal attacks  
- Accepting constructive criticism  
- Showing empathy toward other contributors and users  
- Keeping political disagreements out of code review tone  

**Unacceptable behaviors include:**

- Harassment, trolling, or hate speech  
- Publishing others’ private information  
- Using the project to push partisan smear tooling  
- Sexualized language or imagery in project spaces  

## Enforcement

Project maintainers may remove, edit, or reject comments, commits, code, and issues that violate this Code of Conduct. Serious violations may result in temporary or permanent bans from the project spaces.

Report issues to the maintainers via GitHub (private security advisory or maintainer email listed in SECURITY.md).
